page.title: Automation & Maintenance
page.description: Schedule recurring housekeeping — clean up dead sessions, prune offline agents, and restart the agent fleet or the remote-desktop bridge — and run any task on demand.

REAP_DEAD_SESSIONS.label: Clean dead sessions
REAP_DEAD_SESSIONS.description: Finalize sessions stuck in terminating, expired, or idle.

REAP_ABANDONED_SESSIONS.label: Clean abandoned sessions
REAP_ABANDONED_SESSIONS.description: Terminate sessions whose viewer went silent past the idle ceiling.

PRUNE_DEAD_AGENTS.label: Prune dead agents
PRUNE_DEAD_AGENTS.description: Remove agent registrations that have been offline far too long.

RESTART_AGENTS.label: Restart agents
RESTART_AGENTS.description: Restart every agent process — its container policy brings it back fresh.

PRUNE_AGENT_IMAGES.label: Reclaim disk (images)
PRUNE_AGENT_IMAGES.description: Prune dangling Docker image layers on the agent host.

actions.confirmDeleteHint: This removes the schedule and its run history. This cannot be undone.

dialog.description: Pick what to run and how often. You can always trigger it on demand.
dialog.name: Name
dialog.enabledHint: Disabled tasks keep their config but never run on a schedule.

empty.title: No automated tasks yet
empty.description: Create your first maintenance task to keep the platform tidy on a schedule.
